jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Birlasoft
jsonLd.description:
Birlasoft, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Coimbatore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Birlasoft:
Birlasoft is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in MongoDB

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Birlasoft!
